description: Iteration-1 benchmark: S5 VIP/RAL/env generation with and without skill guidance

eval_cases.name: AHB+AXI4-Stream+SPI+I2C multi-protocol scaffold
eval_cases.description: 4 unique VIPs, 5 registers (AHB RAL), full env. Tests VIP deduplication, protocol-aware signal generation, parameterization.

without_skill.note: self-graded — file layout differed (vip/ vs agents/), naming inconsistent with S5 schema

eval_cases.name: Dual TileLink (DATA_WIDTH=256 and 128) + APB registers
eval_cases.description: Key test: 2 TileLink instances with different params → 1 parameterized VIP. Tests VIP deduplication logic.

without_skill.note: correctly handled TileLink parameterization without guidance

eval_cases.name: APB-UART — no prior skill outputs, full interactive path
eval_cases.description: Most discriminating eval: skill must ask for interface list, register map, and reference model. Without skill: skips questions.

key_fail: a6 (no ref model question — assumed and documented as TODO)

where_skill_adds_value: Eval 3 a1: Skill explicitly asks for interface list when no S1 JSON found — without-skill assumed and proceeded silently
Eval 3 a6: Skill asks about reference model existence before generating ref_model.sv — without-skill generated without asking
Eval 1: Without-skill self-graded 10/10 but used non-standard directory layout (vip/ vs agents/) and non-standard naming — would break S6+ skill chain that expects dv_tb_data.json schema
Skill enforces consistent dv_tb_data.json output schema for downstream consumption (S6+)
where_skill_less_needed: Eval 2: TileLink parameterization — strong agents handle this correctly without guidance
Eval 1: Basic multi-protocol VIP structure — agents know UVM well
recommended_improvements: Add harder eval case: proprietary protocol interface (tests S1 proprietary_interfaces[] consumption)
Add eval case: S1+S2+S3+S4 all available — test schema pass-through fidelity
Eval 1 without-skill self-grading is generous; future evals should use independent grading agent
Add assertion: dv_tb_data.json schema compatibility with S6 downstream (key discriminator)
